_spec: SPEC §5.2 — physiological bounds used to catch a misread decimal (a safety event). Out-of-bounds → the value is flagged for user confirmation, never auto-corrected.
_warning: ⚠️ VERIFY. Ships EMPTY and unverified. These are generous sanity bounds (far wider than reference ranges), not diagnostic thresholds, but they are still safety-relevant — have a clinician review them. While verified=false, no plausibility check runs.
